name: Doodle API
description: Doodle API — REST API for creating and managing Doodle scheduling polls programmatically for meeting coordination.

seo.title: Doodle API — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Doodle API: Doodle API — REST API for creating and managing Doodle scheduling polls programmatically for meeting coordination.

when_to_use: Automate poll creation for group meeting scheduling
Programmatic Doodle poll for interview coordination
API-driven scheduling workflow for HR onboarding
Meeting time aggregation for distributed team coordination
Embed Doodle scheduling into enterprise calendar tool

pros: Useful for coordinating groups via API
cons: Doodle itself feels dated vs Calendly
review.verdict: A narrow API for a narrow product; only worth it if users are already Doodle-loyal.
review.best_for: Apps that need to create group scheduling polls for existing Doodle users
review.not_for: Modern scheduling flows—Calendly, Cronofy, or Cal.com fit better

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
